mapper.select: SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} AND `index` = 1 and `type` = 1
SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} and `type` = 1
SELECT * FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} and `type` = 2
SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} AND type = 1 AND `index` = 2
SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} AND type = 1 AND source = 2
SELECT url FROM app_send_url WHERE send_id = #{id} AND type = 2 AND source = 1 LIMIT 0,1
